notes: New domain interface: CloudSyncAuthService. New data impl: CloudSyncAuthServiceImpl (holds GoogleDriveProvider, ICloudProvider, FlutterSecureStorage). CloudSyncAuthNotifier refactored to thin delegate — zero data-layer imports. googleDriveProviderProvider + iCloudProviderProvider removed from DI; cloudSyncAuthServiceProvider added. bootstrap.dart wired. Test file fully rewritten (29 tests via MockCloudSyncAuthService). 4 screen test files updated (fake notifier pattern). No logic changes, no schema changes. Tests: 3508 (unchanged).
